_DOCUMENTATION.system: Rule-Based Expert System — Forward Chaining Inference Engine
_DOCUMENTATION.description: IF-THEN agronomic rules evaluated daily during simulation. Rules are processed in priority order (lower number = higher priority). Multiple rules can fire on the same day.
condition_variables: f_water        — water stress factor (0-1, where 1=no stress)
f_heat         — heat stress factor (0-1, where 1=no stress)
f_pest         — pest damage factor (0.5-1, where 1=no pest pressure)
soil_water_pct — soil water as % of available water capacity
consecutive_dry_days — days since last rainfall event
action_types: modifier      — adjusts a growth factor (not yet implemented in v1)

rules.name: critical_water_stress
rules.description: Severe water deficit — crop is near wilting; immediate irrigation required.

actions.message: Critical water stress! Soil moisture is severely depleted. Irrigate immediately to prevent irreversible crop damage.
actions.recommendation: Apply 25-30mm irrigation as soon as possible.

rules.name: moderate_water_stress
rules.description: Moderate water deficit — growth rate is being reduced.

actions.message: Moderate water stress detected. Growth rate is being reduced. Consider irrigation within 1-2 days.
actions.recommendation: Apply 15-20mm irrigation to restore optimal soil moisture.

rules.name: critical_heat_stress
rules.description: Extreme temperature — growth is severely inhibited; pollen viability at risk.

actions.message: Critical heat stress! Temperatures are severely above optimal. Pollen viability and fruit set may be compromised.
actions.recommendation: Shade netting and increased irrigation frequency can mitigate heat stress.

rules.name: moderate_heat_stress
rules.description: Above-optimal temperature — biomass accumulation is reduced.

actions.message: Heat stress detected. Daily maximum temperature is above the crop's optimal range. Biomass accumulation is reduced.
actions.recommendation: Monitor temperature trend. Consider shade nets during peak heat (11AM-3PM).

rules.name: flowering_water_critical
rules.description: Water stress during flowering — high risk of pollination failure and yield loss.

actions.message: CRITICAL: Water stress during flowering stage! Pollination failure risk is high. Yield loss of 30-50% is possible without immediate intervention.
actions.recommendation: Prioritize irrigation now. Maintain soil moisture above 70% of field capacity throughout flowering.

rules.name: flowering_heat_critical
rules.description: Heat stress during flowering — pollen viability reduced.

actions.message: CRITICAL: Heat stress during flowering stage! High temperatures reduce pollen viability and fruit/grain set.
actions.recommendation: Apply overhead irrigation to cool the canopy. Avoid pesticide application during peak heat.

rules.name: flowering_stage_notice
rules.description: Informational notice at the start of flowering — critical management period.

actions.message: Crop has entered the flowering/reproductive stage. This is the most critical period for yield determination. Maintain optimal water and temperature conditions.
actions.recommendation: Avoid water stress. Reduce pest pressure with preventive measures.

rules.name: drought_risk_consecutive_dry
rules.description: Prolonged dry spell increasing drought risk.

actions.message: Drought risk: No significant rainfall for 7+ consecutive days. Monitor soil moisture closely.
actions.recommendation: Inspect soil moisture manually. Plan irrigation if no rain is expected within 2 days.

rules.name: grain_fill_water_stress
rules.description: Water stress during grain/fruit filling — yield reduction is occurring.

actions.message: Water stress during grain/fruit/root filling stage. Yield is being reduced. Consistent moisture is critical at this stage.
actions.recommendation: Apply 20-25mm irrigation. Maintain regular irrigation schedule until maturity.

rules.name: low_radiation_day
rules.description: Very low solar radiation — biomass accumulation severely limited today.

actions.message: Canopy interception is very low today (early growth stage or significant cloud cover). Biomass accumulation will be minimal.
actions.recommendation: No action required. Growth rate will improve as canopy develops.

rules.name: harvest_approaching
rules.description: Crop approaching physiological maturity — prepare for harvest.

actions.message: Crop is approaching physiological maturity. Begin preparing harvest equipment and post-harvest storage.
actions.recommendation: Assess crop visually. Reduce irrigation frequency as crop approaches harvest to improve quality.

rules.name: harvest_ready
rules.description: Crop has reached physiological maturity — harvest now.

actions.message: Crop has reached physiological maturity! Harvest as soon as possible to avoid quality loss due to overmaturity.
actions.recommendation: Harvest within 5-7 days for optimal yield and quality. Delay increases risk of field losses.

rules.name: optimal_conditions
rules.description: All stress factors are within optimal range — ideal growing conditions.

actions.message: Optimal growing conditions. All stress factors are within acceptable range. Crop is developing at near-maximum potential.
actions.recommendation: Maintain current management practices.

rules.name: emergence_notice
rules.description: Crop has germinated — seedling establishment phase.

actions.message: Crop has emerged. Seedling establishment is in progress. Protect from excessive rainfall, waterlogging, and surface crusting.
actions.recommendation: Ensure adequate soil moisture but avoid waterlogging. Scout for early pest/disease pressure.

rules.name: combined_heat_water_stress
rules.description: Simultaneous heat and water stress — most damaging condition combination.

actions.message: SEVERE: Combined heat and water stress detected! This is the most damaging condition for crop growth. Immediate intervention is required.
actions.recommendation: Irrigate immediately. Apply mulching to reduce soil temperature and conserve moisture. Consider partial shade if available.

rules.name: critical_nutrient_deficiency
rules.description: Severe nutrient deficiency — growth is severely limited due to lack of essential nutrients.

actions.message: Critical nutrient deficiency detected! Soil nutrient levels are severely depleted. Biomass accumulation is being severely limited.
actions.recommendation: Apply balanced NPK fertilizer immediately. Consider foliar fertilization for quick nutrient uptake. Soil test recommended to identify specific deficiencies.

rules.name: moderate_nutrient_deficiency
rules.description: Moderate nutrient deficiency — growth rate is reduced due to suboptimal nutrient availability.

actions.message: Moderate nutrient stress detected. Growth rate is being reduced due to suboptimal nutrient availability.
actions.recommendation: Apply recommended fertilizer dosage based on crop stage. Split application recommended for better nutrient use efficiency.

rules.name: flowering_nutrient_critical
rules.description: Nutrient deficiency during flowering — high risk of poor fruit/grain set.

actions.message: CRITICAL: Nutrient deficiency during flowering/fruit set! Poor nutrition during reproduction can severely reduce yield.
actions.recommendation: Apply foliar fertilizer with micronutrients (Boron, Zinc) immediately. Follow with soil application of NPK within 2-3 days.

rules.name: high_pest_pressure
rules.description: High pest pressure — significant crop damage from pests is occurring or likely.

actions.message: High pest pressure detected! Current conditions (temperature, humidity, crop stage) are highly favorable for pest development. Crop damage is occurring or imminent.
actions.recommendation: Scout field immediately for pest presence. Apply appropriate pest management measures (IPM, bio-pesticides, or chemical control as needed). Monitor daily.

rules.name: moderate_pest_pressure
rules.description: Moderate pest pressure — conditions favor pest development.

actions.message: Moderate pest pressure detected. Environmental conditions are favorable for pest development.
actions.recommendation: Increase scouting frequency. Consider preventive measures such as pheromone traps, natural predators, or bio-control agents.

rules.name: flowering_pest_critical
rules.description: Pest pressure during flowering — critical risk to pollination and fruit/grain set.

actions.message: CRITICAL: Pest pressure during flowering/fruit set! Pests can damage flowers, reduce pollination, and cause fruit/grain drop.
actions.recommendation: Apply targeted pest control immediately. Use pollinator-safe products if possible. Focus on thrips, aphids, and fruit borers depending on crop.

rules.name: vegetative_pest_warning
rules.description: Pest pressure during vegetative growth — early pest establishment can multiply quickly.

actions.message: Pest pressure during early growth stage. Young plants are vulnerable to pest damage. Early pest populations can multiply rapidly.
actions.recommendation: Scout for early-stage pests (aphids, leaf miners, cutworms). Apply preventive control measures. Protect seedlings with physical barriers if needed.

rules.name: combined_nutrient_pest_stress
rules.description: Simultaneous nutrient deficiency and pest pressure — weakened plant defense.

actions.message: SEVERE: Combined nutrient deficiency and pest pressure! Nutrient-stressed plants have weaker defenses against pests, creating a compounding effect.
actions.recommendation: Address both issues simultaneously: Apply foliar fertilizer for quick nutrient uptake AND implement pest control measures. Healthy nutrition improves pest resistance.
